data.title: Home
data.excerpt: Welcome to Rutba — quality products, fair pricing, and reliable delivery.
data.content:
## Welcome to Rutba

Discover products curated for everyday needs with trusted quality and transparent pricing.

### Why shop with us

- Quality-first sourcing
- Fast and reliable delivery
- Responsive customer support

Start exploring categories and featured offers from the home page.

data.title: About Us
data.excerpt: Learn who we are, what we value, and how we serve customers across Pakistan.
data.content:
## About Rutba

Rutba is building a dependable commerce experience focused on quality, trust, and service excellence.

### Our mission

To make daily shopping simple and reliable through strong supplier partnerships and customer-first operations.

### Our promise

- Honest product descriptions
- Fair return and exchange support
- Continuous improvement through customer feedback

data.title: Terms & Conditions
data.excerpt: Please review the terms governing use of Rutba services and purchases.
data.content:
## Terms & Conditions

By using Rutba services, you agree to these terms.

### Orders

- Orders are confirmed after successful processing.
- We may cancel orders affected by pricing or stock errors.

### Payments

- Payments must be completed using approved methods.
- Refund timing depends on payment provider processing windows.

### Account responsibilities

You are responsible for maintaining accurate account and delivery information.

data.title: Privacy Policy
data.excerpt: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
data.content:
## Privacy Policy

Rutba respects your privacy and protects your personal data.

### Data we collect

- Account details (name, email, phone)
- Order and delivery information
- Support communication records

### How we use data

- Process and deliver orders
- Improve services and customer support
- Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell personal data.

data.title: Return & Exchange Policy
data.excerpt: Understand eligibility, timelines, and process for returns and exchanges.
data.content:
## Return & Exchange Policy

We aim for a smooth and fair post-purchase experience.

### Eligibility

- Items must be unused and in original condition
- Return/exchange requests should be initiated within the allowed policy window
- Certain categories may be non-returnable for hygiene or safety reasons

### Process

1. Contact support with order details
2. Follow pickup/drop-off instructions
3. Receive replacement or refund after inspection

For policy-specific exceptions, contact customer support.
